title: NoSpears
description: Removes all spears from your server by blocking crafting and instantly deleting any spear item found in inventories, chests, or the world.
body:
## 💬 Need a custom plugin or edits?

I make **custom Paper plugins** and can modify this plugin or build something similar for your server.

- Add features to this plugin  
- Custom mechanics / gameplay changes  
- Discord integrations (webhook-based, no bot)  
- Fix or modify existing plugins  

**Fast, optimized, and built for real servers.**

💰 Most small requests: **~$5–$10** USD

**Discord:** `real_ginga`

---

## NoSpears

### Removes all vanilla spears from your Minecraft server.

---

**NoSpears** is a lightweight Paper plugin that completely removes every vanilla spear tier from the game.

Spears cannot be crafted, looted, picked up, stored, or used. They are instantly deleted anywhere they appear.

Designed for server owners who want to disable spears entirely while keeping everything else vanilla.

---

### Complete Spear Removal

NoSpears automatically removes:

- Wooden Spear
- Stone Spear
- Iron Spear
- Golden Spear
- Diamond Spear
- Netherite Spear

All tiers are detected using their official vanilla item IDs.

---

### Crafting Disabled

If a player attempts to craft a spear:

- The crafting result never appears
- The craft is fully blocked
- No duplication or unintended behavior

---

### Loot & Container Protection

Spears are removed from:

- Structure loot chests
- Village chests
- Trial chambers
- Generated loot
- Player inventories
- Ender chests
- Hoppers and droppers
- Item entities on the ground

If a chest generates with spears, they disappear the moment it is opened.

---

### Mob Spawn Protection

If mobs spawn holding spears:

- Spears are stripped from their hands
- Prevents unintended drops or combat imbalance

---

### Lightweight & Safe

- No commands required to function
- No config required for basic usage
- Fully event-driven
- No repeating tasks
- No performance impact

Install and restart.

---

## Support
For help, bug reports, or suggestions, you can join the **discord.**
